payload.answer: The new statement appears to update the project status of the same Brain Slack agent from planned/open to implemented MVP. This is a potential project state transition, not a final policy decision.
citations: Existing: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open
New: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented
